programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Bayern Munich have faced each other 15 times in the UEFA Champions League, and nine times across the last nine campaigns. Since the start of the 2017-18 edition, only Real Madrid v Manchester City has been played more times in the competition than this fixture. Bayern Munich have won each of their last five games against Paris SG in the UEFA Champions League, including one earlier this season. This is already the longest winning streak a team has achieved against Paris SG in major European competition.

programme.title: Football : Liga - Atlético Madrid / Athletic Bilbao
Atlético de Madrid vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: Atlético Madrid and Arsenal will meet for just the fourth time in European competition, with half of those coming in this season’s UEFA Champions League. The Gunners won 4-0 in a league phase meeting last October, which remains Atlético’s joint-heaviest defeat in the competition. Arsenal and Atlético Madrid are the two teams that have played the most matches in the history of the European Cup/Champions League without ever winning the trophy: 223 and 190 respectively.

programme.desc: Atlético Madrid and Arsenal will meet for just the fourth time in European competition, with half of those coming in this season’s UEFA Champions League. The Gunners won 4-0 in a league phase meeting last October, which remains Atlético’s joint-heaviest defeat in the competition. Arsenal and Atlético Madrid are the two teams that have played the most matches in the history of the European Cup/Champions League without ever winning the trophy: 223 and 190 respectively.

programme.title: Sporting Braga vs Freiburg - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the first ever European meeting between Braga and Freiburg – the Portuguese side have won five out of 13 major European games against German teams, though all five have been in group stage matches; they are winless and goalless in four games in the knockout stages. Freiburg’s only previous European encounter with a Portuguese club came in the 2013-14 UEFA Europa League group stage, drawing 1-1 at home and 0-0 away against Estoril Praia.

programme.desc: Getafe CF have won only one of their last 26 LaLiga matches against Barcelona, a 1-0 victory in October 2020, and have failed to score in seven of their last eight league meetings with the Blaugrana. programme.desc: Lyon have lost only one of their last 18 home league matches against Auxerre, a 2-0 defeat in March 2009, which remains the only time they have failed to score against them at home in the top-flight during the 21st century. Sevilla FC ended their longest winless streak against Osasuna in LaLiga history with their 1-0 victory in November 2025; they have not won consecutive league matches against them since October 2021.

programme.title: Angers vs PSG - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
programme.desc: Angers have lost each of their last 17 Ligue 1 matches against Paris Saint-Germain, the longest losing streak for a single team against the same opponent in top-flight history. Angers have not won any of their last 13 home games against Paris SG in Ligue 1, losing the most recent seven.

programme.title: Villarreal vs Celta Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Villarreal have won their last four home games against Celta de Vigo in LaLiga, their longest winning streak at home against the Galician side in the competition's history. Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Villarreal ; they have not gone three consecutive league games without defeat against the Yellow Submarine since November 2019.

programme.title: Rennes vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
programme.desc: This will be the 90th Ligue 1 match between Rennes and Nantes. FC Nantes are the opponents against whom Rennes have won the most often in the top-flight since the start of the 21st century. Rennes have won each of their last seven home games against Nantes in all competitions, as many as they had in their previous 21 such matches.

programme.title: Paris FC vs Lille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31

programme.title: Espanyol vs Levante - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Espanyol have lost only two of their last 14 LaLiga matches against Levante, having lost five of their previous six, and only against Celta de Vigo have they drawn more games than against the Granotas in the competition since 2013/14. At home, Espanyol have lost only two of their 15 LaLiga meetings with Levante, although they have conceded exactly three goals in each of the last two.

programme.title: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Sociedad - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Rayo Vallecano are unbeaten in their last five LaLiga matches against Real Sociedad since a 2-1 defeat in April 2023; this is their longest unbeaten run against the Basque side in their top-flight history. Real Sociedad have picked up points in each of their last seven away LaLiga matches against Rayo Vallecano, their longest unbeaten run away from home against the Madrid side in the top-flight, and their longest ongoing unbeaten away streak against any opponent in the competition.

programme.title: Havre AC vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
programme.desc: Le Havre have failed to score in six of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against Metz, with Thomas Deniaud’s goal in March 2000 their only strike in that period. Le Havre have lost only one of their last 15 home matches against Metz in all competitions, though that defeat came in their most recent meeting in April 2024 in Ligue 1.

programme.title: Real Oviedo vs Elche - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Real Oviedo have won four of their last six LaLiga matches against Elche, one more victory than they managed in their previous 13 top-flight meetings. Following their 1-0 victory at the Martínez Valero in September, Elche have the opportunity to complete a league double over Real Oviedo for only the second time in their history, having previously done so in the 1964/65 campaign.

programme.title: Marseille vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 31
programme.desc: Marseille have won 60 matches against Nice in Ligue 1, the record for victories by one team against another in the history of the competition. Having won the reverse fixture 5-1, Marseille are looking to complete a league double over Nice for the first time since 2018/19. Marseille have the 10th best record in Ligue 1 in 2026, a contrast to their standing at the end of 2025, when they were third.

programme.title: Atletico Madrid vs Athletic Bilbao - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid are unbeaten in their last 14 home league games against Athletic Club since a 0-2 defeat in January 2011 at the Vicente Calderón; it's their longest home unbeaten run against the Basque side in LaLiga history. Following their 1-0 win at San Mamés in December 2025, Athletic Club are looking to win back-to-back LaLiga games against Atlético de Madrid for the first time since October 2011, and for the first time in the same league season since 1999/2000 under Luis Fernández.

programme.title: Valencia vs Girona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Valencia CF have won only one of their last six LaLiga matches against Girona – a 2-0 victory in September 2024 – having won four of their first five meetings in the competition. Girona FC have not drawn any of their five away LaLiga matches against Valencia, their most away games against any opponent in the top flight without a single draw.

programme.title: Atletico Madrid vs Athletic Bilbao - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid are unbeaten in their last 14 home league games against Athletic Club since a 0-2 defeat in January 2011 at the Vicente Calderón; it's their longest home unbeaten run against the Basque side in LaLiga history. Following their 1-0 win at San Mamés in December 2025, Athletic Club are looking to win back-to-back LaLiga games against Atlético de Madrid for the first time since October 2011, and for the first time in the same league season since 1999/2000 under Luis Fernández.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Bayern Munich have faced each other 15 times in the UEFA Champions League, and nine times across the last nine campaigns. Since the start of the 2017-18 edition, only Real Madrid v Manchester City has been played more times in the competition than this fixture. Bayern Munich have won each of their last five games against Paris SG in the UEFA Champions League, including one earlier this season. This is already the longest winning streak a team has achieved against Paris SG in major European competition.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: Atlético Madrid and Arsenal will meet for just the fourth time in European competition, with half of those coming in this season’s UEFA Champions League. The Gunners won 4-0 in a league phase meeting last October, which remains Atlético’s joint-heaviest defeat in the competition. Sporting Braga vs Freiburg - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the first ever European meeting between Braga and Freiburg – the Portuguese side have won five out of 13 major European games against German teams, though all five have been in group stage matches; they are winless and goalless in four games in the knockout stages. Freiburg’s only previous European encounter with a Portuguese club came in the 2013-14 UEFA Europa League group stage, drawing 1-1 at home and 0-0 away against Estoril Praia.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are unbeaten in their last four home games against Aston Villa, all in the Premier League, drawing 1-1 earlier this month at the City Ground. Villa last won there in March 2019 in the Championship under Dean Smith. This is the first major European semi-final between two English teams since the 2008-09 UEFA Champions League between Arsenal and Man Utd, won 4-1 by the Red Devils on aggregate.

programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time.
